channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mailbag: Conference merger scenarios, an MLB model, the poaching-penalty lawsuit, Notre Dame’s status and more
item.description: Depending on the next move by the SEC and Big Ten, or the formation of a super league, there could be merger options for other conferences.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: NCAA committee proposes charged timeout if player goes down with apparent injury after ball spotted
item.description: The NCAA Football Rules Committee announced Friday it would propose that a team be charged with a timeout if one of its players falls to the ground on the field because of an apparent injury after the ball is spotted for the next play.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: QB Matthew Stafford gets a restructured contract and agrees to stay with the Los Angeles Rams
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Quarterback Matthew Stafford is staying with the Los Angeles Rams under a restructured contract, ending weeks of speculation about the Super Bowl winner's future. The Rams announced their new agreement with Stafford on Friday without initially revealing any details.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Georgia passes 'Riley Gaines Act' that aims to prohibit trans athletes from competing in female sports
item.description: The Georgia House passed the "Riley Gaines Act" on Thursday, which aims to keep transgender athletes from competing against biological girls and women.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dale Whitnell makes two holes-in-one in same round at South African Open
item.description: DURBAN, South Africa (AP) — Dale Whitnell made two holes-in-one in the same round at the South African Open on Friday, having entered the day worrying about just making the cut at the European tour event.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFLer Chris Kluwe says he was fired from his job coaching California high school football following MAGA protest
item.description: The former NFL punter garnered national attention this month for his protest against a plaque at the Huntington Beach Central Library with a MAGA reference.
item.dc:creator: Michael Slaten, The Mercury News

item.title: 10 tips on 49ers’ potential defensive recruits at NFL combine
item.description: Here are 10 factoids about defenders at the NFL combine that could help the 49ers rebound under defensive coordinator Robert Saleh.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Fans brawl after Luka Doncic's first game against former team in Los Angeles; Lakers fan knocked out
item.description: After Luka Doncic recorded a triple-double against his former Dallas Mavericks, fans brawled outside of the Los Angeles Lakers' arena.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL coaches value face-to-face interviews with draft prospects at the scouting combine
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — DeMeco Ryans has experienced the NFL scouting combine as a player, assistant coach and head coach. He values the opportunity to meet draft prospects this week.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jose Mourinho banned for four matches and fined after Turkish referees comment
item.description: ISTANBUL, Turkey (AP) — Fenerbahce manager Jose Mourinho was given a four-match ban and fined by the Turkish Football Federation following his comments about Turkish referees after a match at Galatasaray.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: In dominant triple-double performance, Pelicans' Zion Williamson provides reminder of his talent
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — The injuries have taken on toll on Zion Williamson during his six-year NBA career. So have the losses. But on nights like Thursday, there are tantalizing reminders of how much talent the 2019 No. 1 overall pick still possesses.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Southern California, UCLA, Texas and Notre Dame are projected top seeds in women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: JuJu Watkins and Southern California have moved up to a No. 1 seed in the women's NCAA Tournament in the latest projections of the top teams.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An ex-minor league catcher was accused of trying to lose on purpose. He says he didn't tip pitches
item.description: A former minor league catcher in the Minnesota Twins organization who was released last year, reportedly because he tried to make sure his team would lose so the season would end, denied the allegation in an interview with The Athletic and said he didn't tip any pitches to his opponents.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating Jon Gruden into their ring of honor
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating former coach Jon Gruden into the team's ring of honor less than four years after removing him over his use of racist, homophobic and misogynistic language in emails he wrote to an NFL executive.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Heisman Trophy winner and 2-way star Travis Hunter says he won't work out at the NFL combine
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Heisman Trophy winner Travis Hunter insists he's a different kind of player. He's just waiting until March to put on his dazzling show for NFL scouts.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blackhawks fall in Utah, drop 4th straight as rough February nears end
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — There are at least two good things about the month of February for the Blackhawks: That it's almost over and that they didn't play for half of it. Because when they've been on the ice, it hasn't been a good month.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago Bears NFL Scouting Combine Preview: Bears picks, workout schedule and more
item.description: The Chicago Bears have seven picks in the 2025 NFL Draft, including five picks in the first five rounds, and are looking to address needs in the offensive line, defensive line, running back, tight end, and safety positions.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz late comeback falls short against Portland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anfernee Simons had 28 points and out six assists to lead the Portland Trail Blazers to a 114-112 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Keyonte George, who scored 21 points, missed a 25-foot three-pointer at the buzzer that would have won the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: University of Utah fires head basketball coach Craig Smith
item.description: The University of Utah has fired the head coach of its men's basketball program, Craig Smith. Assistant coach Josh Eilert will take over for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Guenther scores game-winner in 2-1 victory over Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther scored the tiebreaking goal with 5:53 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vancouver Canucks 2-1 at Delta Center on Sunday. Guenther scored on the power play by tipping in a backdoor pass from Nick Schmaltz at the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mystics trade 2-time All-Star Ariel Atkins to the Sky for No. 3 pick in WNBA draft
item.description: The Washington Mystics accelerated their rebuild, trading two-time All-Star Ariel Atkins to the Chicago Sky for the No. 3 overall pick in this year's draft on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Rodriguez makes half-court shot, wins Bucknell student $10,000
item.description: Former Major League Baseball star Alex Rodriguez showed his skill on the hardwood Sunday, making a half-court shot to win a Bucknell student $10,000.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU wins thriller over #19 Arizona, 96-95
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored a team-high 23 points including two free throws in the final seconds as BYU defeated No. 19 Arizona 96-96 on Saturday evening at a sold out McKale Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
